qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, LIQ07_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, LIQ07_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@liq} {%? (string(#SOURCE:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_liq)!='') {% AND LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq in ({%=string(#SOURCE:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_liq) %}) %} {% AND 1 = 2 %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, LIQ07_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, LIQ07_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@liq} {%? (string(#SOURCE:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_liq)!='') {% AND LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq not in ({%=string(#SOURCE:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_liq) %}) %} {% AND 1 = 1 %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:define.declare: <DATOS liq="1"> <ROWS> <ROW check="0" text="Camarasa, Daniel" code="15001228" value="221" id="221" oi_personal_liq="8"/> <ROW check="0" text="RIZZO, JUAN PABLO" code="2" value="232" id="232" oi_personal_liq="4"/> <ROW check="1" text="CRAPACHER, ATILIO PEDRO" code="3" value="233" id="233" oi_personal_liq="7"/> <ROW check="0" text="BLAJOS, MARIO CONSTANTINO" code="4" value="234" id="234" oi_personal_liq="6"/> <ROW check="1" text="AVILA, JUSTO LORENZO" code="5" value="235" id="235" oi_personal_liq="1"/> <ROW check="0" text="CEREDA, CARLOS MARTIN" code="8" value="239" id="239" oi_personal_liq="3"/> </ROWS> </DATOS>
qry:define.name: PRUEBA
